channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog fouling and bird pooing, 16th April
item.description:
There is on the northwold road and upper Clapton road dog fouling and bird pooing everywhere this is a constant problem as it's becoming a nuisance on public street and people have dogs on the road let them foul and never clean it up which is despicable
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Upper Clapton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lose manhole cover moving when cars ,lorry's and buses drove over the manhole cover making a loud noise., 16th April
item.description:
Lose manhole cover moving when cars ,lorry's and buses drove over the manhole cover making a loud noise.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parsonage Manorway, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very uneven paving slabs, 16th April
item.description:
Dangerously rocking and proud paving slabs over 50mm. Problem existed over 1 year Adjacent side elevation 185 Penhill Road. Bexley DA5 3EU
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185, Penhill Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping sofa and cushions by 61a Dalston Lane., 16th April
item.description:
Fly tipping sofa and cushions by 61a Dalston Lane.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A white male was seen in the courtyard sitting on the bench smoking class B drugs cannabis late at night. He is known to the metropolitan police in is a sexual predator. Children's and family live in area and Jewish communities., 16th April
item.description:
Someone could please address this illegal activity taking place in courtyard by this individual male.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various items dumped by 41 Cecilia Road., 16th April
item.description:
Various items dumped by 41 Cecilia Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cecilia Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bad pothole repairs, 16th April
item.description:
Potholes have been repaired badly not been done to Highway spec i.e cut out and levelled off.Your contractors need to go and redo these at no cost to the council. Does no one in your highway dept every go and inspect this shoddy work.I will give it 2 weeks then I will escalate this matter to local m.ps
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prince of Wales Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Why have the authority taking the poor children swings down. there is no swings for the children to play on. this is very discriminating to which children's play area., 16th April
item.description:
Can Hackney Council put swings back up for children to play on please. hackney Council being horrible to children. Children need things to do.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lavington Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge needs cutting, 16th April
item.description:
The grass verges are in need of cutting. Please note that this will be the first cut this year, and these verges always get missed. Please can you ensure that all verges are cut on the mungo park estate and not just in mungo park road. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beamish Road, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A couple of rubbish bags have been dumped and spills all over the grass, 16th April
item.description:
Someone dumped some black rubbish bags and they had burst open or been ripped by animals and rubbish is spread all over the grass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Steyning Grove, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water running from under garden onto pavement into road., 16th April
item.description:
This water running out onto pavement and across road. Been like it for many weeks now. Husband is disabled and cases problem as he tries to cross over the slippery puddles running water. Not sure if it’s clean or sewage as doesn’t look nice. Obviously not rain water. I’ve seen many people trying to step over and around it. Picking up dogs to avoid it too so not sure if others have reported or householder aware???

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I’ve seen people in mobility scooters having to go into the road as they cannot use the footpath due to the stack of timber being left out on the footpath., 16th April
item.description:
The issue has been in place for the whole of today 16-04-26

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farnham Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Every single day FRY TIPPING, 16th April
item.description:
Reported yesterday like every day someone left a bed and duvet. Found this today again! Hackney Council if no action will be taken to check the CCTV camera to end this and find who I doing this we will inform the metropolitan police.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Giant pothole in middle of road, 16th April
item.description:
Right where cars wheels go and where pedestrians cross. I just tripped on it!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and leaves., 16th April
item.description:
A lot of rubbish and leaves,can you please help us clean this mess away.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Vale, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken grill, 16th April
item.description:
Looks like a section has been broken and removed and now the gap is big enough and deep enough that this could be an accident waiting to happen

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Byron Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suitcase dumped in grass verge on imperial way, 16th April
item.description:
Waste matter such as litter and a suitcase dumped on grass verge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Imperial Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Serious and rapidly worsening potholes all along brecknock road, especially between lupton street and torriano avenue, 16th April
item.description:
Large potholes all along this road to be honest - it ultimately and urgently needs a full resurfacing. It's a busy bus route and lots of lorries also seem to use it. Quite apart from damage to road vehicles, as a cyclist its really quite dangerous to dodge/go through the large potholes and broken road surface (lots of lose stones etc)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169, Brecknock Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown Ivy spread through the wooden fences of gardens behind, 16th April
item.description:
Ivy overgrown, and is breaking through wooden garden fences/potentially causing minor damage to the fences/sheds etc.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87, Stanhope Grove, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Business's furniture blocking pavement, 16th April
item.description:
This business seems to pile up loads of their furniture, beer kegs, crash barriers, bins and cones well into the pavement, forcing pedestrians into road and path of bikes and vehicles. It's been like this for months and getting worse.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rivington Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
